title: 20 Seconds to Midnight
description: A Steampunk-Fantasy modpack about stopping the end of the world
body:
![20 Seconds to Midnight banner in a stylized pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DxKocIb0/images/c90da380e33e1f6163e82f7aa64b89ddf3623048.png '20 Seconds to Midnight')

# The sequel, coming to a server near you...

This modpack was originally made for the 20 Seconds to Midnight server, which is no longer up.
I've started work on 20StM's successor, Vertigo 4.1. No *specific* ETA on when it'll be out, other than "a couple months", but I'll be sure to link it here when it's getting close to being ready.
It's successor can be found on [our Discord](https://discord.gg/DDWSHxhpSj)

# About this modpack

20 Seconds to Midnight is a **Steampunk-Fantasy** modpack about trying to stop *t͟h͟e͟ ͟e͟n͟d͟ ͟o͟f͟ ͟t͟h͟e͟ ͟w͟o͟r͟l͟d͟.* You're dropped into the world of Sanctuary, a living world that you and 15 other people must build up in order to save it.

## The Horde
![The Horde's Gravemind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DxKocIb0/images/620011167e78a3157e89b2dd6002c89baf79eed4.jpeg 'The Gravemind')

An ancient relentless evil is lurking in the deep dark. It doesn't just feed, it *hungers.* And it's **hunting you.** 

As you fight the Horde, it *learns.* It will start adapting to your tactics, mobs will fight better, harder, faster, and stronger and will make its' mission to make your life a living hell.

It's smart. You can't run from it, you can't hide. It will find you, and it will make you one with it. And it will not stop until the entire world becomes the Horde. Not unless you stop it first!

## Building Features
![Picture of a floating village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DxKocIb0/images/c603f0ad6c8ff945d15d19707dfb3e3ef10a69f4.jpeg 'Floating village')

- Start a Faction with [Argonauts](https://modrinth.com/mod/argonauts).
- Talk to people, like, [with your *mouth*](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice).
- Automate everything with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), make [train networks](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails), and even [electricity!](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)
- Create not enough for you? How about starting the Industrial Revolution with [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition) and [Pneumaticcraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)?
- [Commit black magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/forbidden-arcanus) to rebel against the Industrial Revolution!
- If wizardry is more your speed, then [Iron's Spells & Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) is also there for you.
- Forge [new armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors) and weapons like the [Sculk Horn](https://modrinth.com/mod/-sculk-horn) to beat back the Horde.
- Create a [Backpack](https://github.com/P3pp3rF1y/SophisticatedBackpacks) to stay on the move.
- If that's not enough storage for you, [I don't know what is.](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage)
- Craft new vehicles [on the ground](https://modrinth.com/mod/automobility) and [in the air](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) to traverse Sanctuary.
- Build colonies from the ground up with [Minecolonies](https://wiki.minecolonies.ldtteam.com/source/tutorials/getting-started).
- Find the... [Killer Rabbit?](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)
- Bring out the Holy Hand Grenade!

## World Features
![The world generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DxKocIb0/images/fbede7243a47ec18ecb0f5e9be40e6ad89d28c2b.jpeg 'The world generation')
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), together with [Terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) have transformed the world to be what you've always dreamed of it being.
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves), as well as Yung's [entire suite of mods](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG/mods) have transformed the underground into something new and alien, breathing new life into caving.
- [CT's Overhauled Villages](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village) has transformed the normal village into a place you might actually live!
- Do [missions](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful) for the villagers to get cool rewards!
- Speak to the [Mystical Oak Tree](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-oak-tree)
- Launch yourself into the stratosphere with [beds!](https://modrinth.com/mod/bouncier-beds)
- Start a [Restaraunt](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) during the apocalypse!

## Installation Details

This pack needs Java 23 from [Temurin](https://adoptium.net/en-GB/temurin/releases/?os=windows&arch=x64&package=jre&version=23)

Set Minecraft to use Java 23, allocate 8GB of RAM for best results
